results.title: RingCentral AI Meetings: Smarter Video Collaboration Suite
results.content:
####

RingEX is RingCentral's comprehensive AI-powered unified communications platform, combining calls, texts, video meetings, and faxes in one reliable application. It serves as the foundation for your entire business communications system, combining phone, messaging, SMS, and basic video meetings into a single, integrated workspace.

AI Meetings is a specialized video collaboration suite designed to extend beyond the everyday meeting capabilities included in RingEX. While RingEX focuses on unified communications across multiple channels, AI Meetings provides advanced video solutions for scenarios that demand more sophisticated features and scale.

Key Differences between RingEX and AI Meetings [...] ### Book a meeting

### Book a meeting

Thank you for your interest in RingCentral

A sales advisor will contact you within 24 hours. If you'd like to speak to someone now, please call (800) 574 5290 574 5290) [...] Meetings: Your everyday video collaboration solution for internal team sync-ups, external client calls, brainstorming sessions, and project discussions. Features include AI-generated transcripts, interactive whiteboards, breakout rooms for focused group work, shared notes and action items, and comprehensive screen sharing capabilities—all designed to make daily collaboration seamless and productive.

results.title: AI is making phones smarter, but notifications are more broken than ever | TechRadar
results.content:
What was meant to be seamless ends up being something else you have to manage. And for something as fundamental as how we interact with our phones, that’s a big miss.

results.title: Non-Emergency Calls with RapidSOS HARMONY
results.content:
Read AI-generated summary

Blog Header: How RapidSOS AI Reduces Admin Call Workload: AI Call summary example: At 11:40 a.m., Mary Anderson reported an abandoned vehicle at 10 Wall Street. The car is a gray Mazda sedan with Pennsylvania license plate ABC 555. Vehicle has been sitting outside his home for weeks and has flat tires.

Listen to article

3 min read

Your phone rings. It’s a fireworks complaint. A few minutes later, it’s a car alarm. Then a noise complaint. As a 911 professional, your team is on a life-and-death mission every single day, but a huge portion of your team’s time is spent on calls that are not genuine emergencies. [...] This specialization means that while we help you automate the mundane, we continue to emphasize safety or trust.

The outcome: Reclaimed time and renewed focus

The greatest value of RapidSOS UNITE’s non-emergency call automation is the impact it has on the people serving our communities.

Those complaints about fireworks, car alarms or loud neighbors that previously took up valuable time and created frustrations for your staff? Now, HARMONY can handle them instead.

By offloading repetitive and draining non-emergency calls, RapidSOS UNITE can combat burnout, improve morale, and help ensure your agency maintains crucial key performance indicators like speed-to-answer.

results.title: Scam Texts Are Getting Exposed… But AI Models Are Getting Pulled | Dirt Report
results.content:
a speed bump in this. Sometimes, that speed bump is enough to stop someone handing over their details. [music] For businesses, though, this is where it gets problematic. If you send branded SMS messages and you have not registered your sender ID, your messages may suddenly look [music] This is not just a design problem, this is a trust problem. This is customers ignoring appointment reminders, missing bills, missing delivery updates, or ringing support [music] asking, "Is this actually you?" So, if you run a business and you send messages under a brand name, speak to your Telco or SMS provider and get sender ID registered. If you just send from a normal phone number, this is less relevant. This is about the brand name being in the top [music] in the space where your phone number would [...] # Scam Texts Are Getting Exposed… But AI Models Are Getting Pulled | Dirt Report
